name: the-nineteenth-chamber-backend
description: Backend services for The Nineteenth Chamber

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:customer" "npm run dev:ticket" "npm run dev:order" "npm run dev:invoice" "npm run dev:pdf"
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start:gateway" "npm run start:auth" "npm run start:customer" "npm run start:ticket" "npm run start:order" "npm run start:invoice" "npm run start:pdf"
scripts.install-all: npm run install:gateway && npm run install:auth && npm run install:customer && npm run install:ticket && npm run install:order && npm run install:invoice && npm run install:pdf
